About LOTRO Guides

A fan-created resource for Lord of the Rings Online players. We cover class builds, crafting guides, instance walkthroughs, and the latest LOTRO news. Made by the community, for the community.

This is a fan site and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Standing Stone Games or Middle-earth Enterprises.

Community

Join fellow LOTRO adventurers across Middle-earth. Share your knowledge, ask questions, and help new players find their way.
